texto: Society has changed so dramatically that it's empowered the individual, and technology has a lot to do with that. Years ago, if you had a bad experience at a restaurant, you could complain to the manager. Maybe you could picket. Now, you go online and write a review that may go viral.
explicacao: Citação de Brad Katsuyama sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Society has changed so dramatically that it's empowered the individual, and technology has a lot …” articula reflexao, experience, society em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e society.

frase_original: Society has changed so dramatically that it's empowered the individual, and technology has a lot to do with that. Years ago, if you had a bad experience at a restaurant, you could complain to the manager. Maybe you could picket. Now, you go online and write a review that may go viral.
